name: audio_manager
description_pt: Gerenciador central de áudio. Controla volume dos buses Master/Music/SFX e fornece play_sfx/play_music. Destrava sfx_player, music_playlist e ambience_zone.
description_en: Central audio manager. Controls Master/Music/SFX bus volumes and provides play_sfx/play_music. Unlocks sfx_player, music_playlist, and ambience_zone.

parameters.name: master_volume_db
parameters.description_pt: Volume do bus Master em dB.

parameters.name: music_volume_db
parameters.description_pt: Volume do bus Music em dB.

parameters.name: sfx_volume_db
parameters.description_pt: Volume do bus SFX em dB.
